title: test/e2e: fix network prune flake
body:
Creating networks in a different dir is not parallel safe when running containers on them as the network configs may end up using the same bridge names which then causes conflicts on the host.

Fixes #23876

Sorry to have missed this PR. There are ten other tests in `prune_test.go` that call `useCustomNetworkDir()` but do not have the `Serial` decorator. Plus one each in `system_reset_test.go` and `volume_prune_test.go`. Should those be fixed as well?

> Sorry to have missed this PR. There are ten other tests in `prune_test.go` that call `useCustomNetworkDir()` but do not have the `Serial` decorator. Plus one each in `system_reset_test.go` and `volume_prune_test.go`. Should those be fixed as well?

It is complicated, as mentioned in the comment update in the commit we only need that for non custom networks and running containers, the default podman network will be fine. Unless both conditions are met it should not be needed.
While it would be safer to do it it also slows down the test down if we have to add a lot more Serial things here so I wanted to avoid it.
